title: Cookies Policy
previousVersions: Previous versions are available upon request

introduction.description: This Cookies Policy explains how A.I. Doctor Medical Assist LTD ("Doctorina," "we," "us," or "our") uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website at https://doctorina.com and our web application at https://app.doctorina.com (collectively, the "Services").
introduction.consent: By using our Services, you consent to the use of cookies and similar technologies as described in this policy.

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our website, personalize content and advertisements, analyze traffic, and ensure data security. This Cookie Policy explains what cookies we use, for what purposes, and how you can manage them.

typesOfCookies.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
typesOfCookies.description: We use the following categories of cookies:

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the functioning of the website, including navigation and access to secure areas.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies remember your preferences and settings (such as language or region) to provide a more personalized experience.

analytical.title: Analytical Cookies
analytical.description: These cookies collect information about how visitors use the site to help us analyze and improve its performance.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to deliver advertisements that are relevant to you and to evaluate the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.

localStorage.title: 3. Local Storage Technologies
localStorage.description: In addition to cookies, our Services use other local storage technologies:

localStorage.title: 3.1 Local Storage and Session Storage
localStorage.purpose: Purpose: Storing user preferences, application state, and temporary data
localStorage.data: Data: User settings, language preferences, temporary form inputs
localStorage.retention: Retention: Until manually cleared or browser cache is cleared

indexedDB.title: 3.2 IndexedDB (Web Application)
indexedDB.purpose: Purpose: Local database for offline functionality and performance optimization
indexedDB.data: Data: Chat messages, user data for offline access, application cache
indexedDB.retention: Retention: Until manually cleared or when you delete your account

sharedPreferences.title: 3.3 SharedPreferences (Mobile App)
sharedPreferences.purpose: Purpose: Storing app preferences and settings
sharedPreferences.data: Data: User preferences, authentication state, app configuration
sharedPreferences.retention: Retention: Until app is uninstalled or data is manually cleared

firebase.title: 4.1 Firebase Analytics (Mobile App)
firebase.purpose: Purpose: Mobile app analytics and performance monitoring
firebase.dataCollected: Data Collected: App usage patterns, crash reports, performance metrics

youtube.title: 4.2 YouTube (Embedded Videos)
youtube.purpose: Purpose: Video content delivery on our landing page
youtube.dataCollected: Data Collected: Video viewing behavior, device information

googleFonts.title: 4.3 Google Fonts
googleFonts.dataCollected: Data Collected: IP address, browser information

browserSettings.title: 5.1 Browser Settings
browserSettings.description: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
browsers: Chrome: Settings > Privacy and Security > Cookies and other site data
Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
Safari: Preferences > Privacy > Manage Website Data
Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions

optOutOptions.title: 5.2 Opt-Out Options
options: Matomo Analytics: You can opt out by visiting our privacy settings or using the opt-out feature in your browser
Firebase Analytics: Available through mobile app settings
All Analytics: You can disable analytics tracking by contacting us at support@doctorina.com

consequences.title: 5.3 Consequences of Disabling Cookies
consequences.description: Disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our Services:
effects: You may need to re-enter information more frequently
Some features may not work properly
Your user experience may be less personalized

dataSecurity.title: 6. Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect cookie data:

internationalTransfers.title: 7. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Some of our service providers may be located outside your country. When we transfer cookie data internationally, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including:
safeguards: Other appropriate safeguards as required by applicable law

policyUpdates.title: 8. Updates to This Policy
policyUpdates.description: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify you by:
methods: Posting the updated policy on our website
Sending you an email notification (if you have an account)
Displaying a notice on our Services

contact.title: 9. Contact Information
contact.description: If you have questions about this Cookies Policy or our use of cookies, please contact us:
contact.address:
